nodes.name: 丘鹬属
nodes.summary: 丘鹬属（Scolopax）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联7种鸟类，如American woodcock、Amami woodcock、Bukidnon woodcock等7种鸟类。

nodes.name: Sulawesi woodcock
nodes.summary: Sulawesi woodcock（Scolopax celebensis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Sulawesi woodcock。

nodes.name: Sulawesi woodcock
nodes.summary: The Sulawesi woodcock (Scolopax celebensis) also known as Celebes woodcock, is a medium-sized wader. It is larger and darker than Eurasian woodcock but with small reddish spots. This species is restricted to wet mountain forests on the Indonesian island of Sulawesi. Little is known of its habits. References Shorebirds by Hayman, Marchant and Prater, ISBN 0-7099-2034-2 External links BirdLife Species Factsheet
